mapper.sql: A.NNON_KT_SVC_MST_SEQ, A.SODRNUM, A.SREGYN, A.SWORKERID , A.SWORKERNAME, A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM, A.SCUSTNAME , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SINSTALLADDRESS , A.SINSTALLROADADDRESS, A.SOFFICECODE, A.SICISOFFICESCODE, A.SEN_CUSTNAME , A.SASNUM, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID

, B.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME , C.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICENAME , D.SSVC_LGROUP_NM AS SEX_SVC_NM , E.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , F.SIP_BLOCK AS SIP_BLOCK , G.SREGYN_TYPE_NM AS SREGYN_TYPE_NM , I.SFLAG_TYPE_NM AS SFLAG_TYPE_NM , J.SUSER_NM AS SMODIFY_NM
, A.SICISOFFICESNAME , A.SOFFICENAME , A.SEX_SVC_NM , A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , A.SIP_BLOCK , A.SREGYN_TYPE_NM , A.SFLAG_TYPE_NM , A.SMODIFY_NM

, MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD D , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD E , BIF.TB_NON_KT_IPBLOCK F , MST.V_TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST_SREGYN_TYPE_CD G , (SELECT MAX(NNON_KT_IPBLOCK_SEQ) AS NNON_KT_IPBLOCK_SEQ FROM BIF.TB_NON_KT_IPBLOCK GROUP BY NNON_KT_SVC_MST_SEQ,SIP_BLOCK ) H , MST.V_TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST_SFLAG_TYPE_CD I , MST.TB_USER_BAS J

AND A.SICISOFFICESCODE = B.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SOFFICECODE = C.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SEX_SVC_CD = D.SEX_SVC_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = E.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NNON_KT_SVC_MST_SEQ = F.NNON_KT_SVC_MST_SEQ AND A.SREGYN = G.SREGYN_TYPE_CD(+) AND F.NNON_KT_IPBLOCK_SEQ = H.NNON_KT_IPBLOCK_SEQ AND F.SFLAG !='D' AND F.SFLAG = I.SFLAG_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SMODIFY_ID = J.SUSER_ID(+)

GROUP BY A.NNON_KT_SVC_MST_SEQ, A.SODRNUM, A.SREGYN, A.SWORKERID , A.SWORKERNAME, A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM, A.SCUSTNAME , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SINSTALLADDRESS , A.SINSTALLROADADDRESS, A.SOFFICECODE, A.SICISOFFICESCODE, A.SEN_CUSTNAME , A.SASNUM, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT
, B.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME , C.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICENAME , D.SSVC_LGROUP_NM AS SEX_SVC_NM , E.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , G.SREGYN_TYPE_NM AS SREGYN_TYPE_NM , J.SUSER_NM AS SMODIFY_NM FROM BIF.TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD D , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD E , MST.V_TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST_SREGYN_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_USER_BAS J
AND A.SICISOFFICESCODE = B.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SOFFICECODE = C.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SEX_SVC_CD = D.SEX_SVC_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = E.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SREGYN = G.SREGYN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SMODIFY_ID = J.SUSER_ID(+)
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST A
SELECT A.SICISOFFICESCODE AS CODE , C.SLVL_NM AS NAME FROM BIF.TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD C WHERE 1=1 AND A.SICISOFFICESCODE = C.SLVL_CD(+) GROUP BY A.SICISOFFICESCODE , C.SLVL_NM
SELECT A.SOFFICECODE AS CODE , C.SLVL_NM AS NAME FROM BIF.TB_NON_KT_SVC_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD C WHERE 1=1 AND A.SOFFICECODE = C.SLVL_CD(+) GROUP BY A.SOFFICECODE , C.SLVL_NM
